DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY DAVID MENDEZ PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT BILLY NOK PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED STIP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOK, BILLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 505 O'FARRELL STREET #401, SAN FRANCISCO $1,351.15 RENT, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,459.15, STAYED UNTIL JUN-10-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. IF DEFT VACATES ON/BEFORE 6-10-96, DEFT MAY HAVE JUDGMENT DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL OR HAVE JUDGMNT SET ASIDE AND ACTION DISMISSED BY PLTF, AND EACH SIDE WILL BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATNYS FEES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
